name: Creating Great README Files for Your Python Projects
snippet: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to create, organize, and format high-quality README files for your Python projects.

name: What format for a Python package's README on github?

name: pemtajo/badge-readme: Add badges in your Readme - GitHub
snippet: Badge Readme is an open-source GitHub Action that automatically fetches and displays your Credly badges in your GitHub profile README.

name: How to Write a README for Your Beginner Python Project - YouTube
snippet: This is a lesson in a python short course. This will demonstrate how to design and write an engaging readme file for your Github repository.
